_note: v2: game-first anchoring + game_reference rubric (see build_guide.v2 note).
template: {game} video game key art, split composition: {subject_left} facing right on the left half, {subject_right} facing left on the right half, both rendered in faithful {game} art style inside a recognizable {game} arena, crackling lightning seam down the center, {palette} palette, {lighting}, clean zone for composited text
negative: text, letters, words, watermark, blurry, low contrast, generic arena, unrelated game

rubric.game_reference: 1-5 — is THIS game unmistakable (creatures, environment, art style)?
